intentSynonyms: get a featured content in wikipedia
look up a featured content in wikipedia
fetch a single featured content in wikipedia
view one specific featured content in wikipedia
get today's featured content in wikipedia
description: Get Wikipedia's featured content for a specific date: Today's Featured Article, most-read articles, and On This Day events. Uses the Wikimedia REST API.

date.description: Date in YYYY/MM/DD format (e.g., "2026/03/09"). Defaults to today.
